name: Bisquick Butterscotch Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine the Bisquick®, brown sugar, eggs, and melted butter.
3. Stir in the coconut cream and pecans until well mixed.
4. Fold in the vanilla extract.
5. Pour batter into a greased 9x13 inch baking pan.
6. Bake for 45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow to cool on a wire rack before cutting.
